name: apsal-studio
description: Build live-action AI photography with five semantic stage previews, a rights-scoped visual anchor, complete Prompts, and direct Codex generation.

interface.shortDescription: Five-stage world building for coherent photo sets
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio follows the current Chinese or English Codex conversation, turning one natural-language idea into five highlighted text-card layers covering all thirteen protocol roles. A localized thumbnail strip summarizes Direction, Worldbuilding, Narrative, Image and Delivery without replacing the complete proposals. New sets support Chaptered Variation or Continuous Narrative. Finalization packages all Prompts, real rights-scoped references with one core visual anchor when available, and separate non-generation stage previews before Codex generates one independent image per turn.
defaultPrompt: 创建九张真人摄影主题，用三章多场景多妆造方案并打包全部提示词。
Create a nine-image live-action photography theme, confirm all thirteen elements, and package every Prompt.
Open this legacy APSAL ZIP, recover its references, and generate the first image directly with Codex.
